title: Share view with password protection
excerpt: The share view is great, but we have sensitive data that cannot be simply displayed on a link. It should be an option to add a protection layer with a password. This way only people authorized (that have both the link an…

posts.author: Tai_Freitas (Tainá)
posts.cookedHtml: The share view is great, but we have sensitive data that cannot be simply displayed on a link. It should be an option to add a protection layer with a password. This way only people authorized (that have both the link and password) can view the board not having to do all the guest process to create a full account with login and password once it won’t be used.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if there has been any traction on this one? Private boards are nice, but password protection would be great!

posts.author: TylerJohnson (Tyler Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates here from the Monday team? This would be FANTASTIC.

posts.author: brianjw (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: This is also a requirement for our team to be able to share sensitive information with non-members.

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @brianjw

Have you tried our latest app Client Portal Builder yet?

Let me know what you think.

– Markus
